creator: marcinrz@gmail.com
text:
Dovecot 1.1.6 fails to build with managesieve support after dovecot-managesieve was updated to 0.10.4 version.

Fix: There are missed entries for dovecot-1.1.6-managesieve-0.10.4.diff.gz in /usr/ports/mail/dovecot/distinfo. Attached patch fixes it.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Simply:
make -C /usr/ports/mail/dovecot config install
